title: Migration template core fields

queries: Migration validation and load result fields

queries: Product master core fields

summary: Field-set context for product/material identity, type/category, base unit, product group and status. Use together with Field Atlas MARA/MATNR seed context for migration label mapping.
title: Product master core fields

queries: Purchase order core fields

summary: Field-set context for PO FOs: purchase order/item, supplier, purchasing organization, company code, material/service, quantity, net amount, delivery date, goods receipt indicator and invoice receipt indicator.
title: Purchase order core fields

queries: Purchase requisition core fields

summary: Field-set context for PR FOs: requisition/item, material or service text, quantity, plant, requester, account assignment category, cost object, workflow status and source-of-supply readiness.
title: Purchase requisition core fields

queries: Sales order core fields

summary: Field-set context for sales order FOs: sales order/item, sales organization, distribution channel, division, sold-to, ship-to, material, quantity, net amount, delivery hold, billing hold and output relevance.
title: Sales order core fields

queries: Supplier invoice AP core fields

summary: Field-set context for supplier invoice FO design: supplier invoice key, supplier, company code, gross amount, currency, tax amount, posting date, workflow status and payment block context.
title: Supplier invoice AP core fields

queries: Supplier invoice workflow routing fields

summary: Field atlas item for the supplier invoice fields used by approval routing examples. These fields are generic implementation context and must be verified against the target tenant before configuration or development.
title: Supplier invoice workflow routing fields
